Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MYRON ROY SIEGEL, generally known as M. ROY SIEGEL'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.
APPEARANCES: Nathaniel Dunn, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys 989-4730 for pltf & opposing party; M. Roy Siegel, 818/386-9454 deft & moving party in propria persona (appearing via CourtCall).
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. Defendant has shown excusable neglect. In addition, defendant to file an answer by 10/28/08. Defendant to submit proposed form of order. (302/HEK) JUDGE HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
